name: run-test
description: Run a test or check command with timeout and filter out verbose noise; supports pytest, go, jest, vitest, cargo, mocha, and prettier shortcuts.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Test command or test files to run when not using a shortcut flag

parameters.name: -C, --dir
parameters.description: Working directory to run the command in (default: .)

parameters.name: --cargo, --cargo-test
parameters.description: Shortcut for cargo test showing only errors and summary

parameters.name: --cargo-build
parameters.description: Shortcut for cargo build showing only errors, warnings, and compilation status

parameters.name: --cargo-check
parameters.description: Shortcut for cargo check showing only errors and warnings

parameters.name: -g, --go-test
parameters.description: Shortcut for go test with verbose output filtering

parameters.name: --ts, --ts-jest, --jest
parameters.description: Shortcut for npx jest with auto-timeout

parameters.name: --vitest
parameters.description: Shortcut for npx vitest run with verbose reporter and noise filtering

parameters.name: --mocha
parameters.description: Shortcut for npx mocha showing only pass/fail summary lines

parameters.name: --prettier
parameters.description: Shortcut for npx prettier --check showing only unformatted files

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Filter test names by pattern (passed to -k for pytest, -run for go, -t for jest/vitest/cargo)

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show only first N lines of output, default all

examples.expected: error[E0433]: failed to resolve: use of undeclared type `JsNativeError`

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses test/build command with timeout and noise-filtering pipeline into one step, and with --cargo-build replaces separate cargo build + tail/head steps, saving 1-2 agent steps per invocation.
